update: services.tenancyUnits.deleteProject  deletes the specified project resource identified by a tenant resource tag.
The Service Consumer Management API includes the following additions for managing tenancy units:
services.tenancyUnits.undeleteProject  attempts to undelete a previously deleted tenant project.
services.tenancyUnits.attachProject  attaches an existing project to a tenancy unit as a new tenant resource.
services.tenancyUnits.applyProjectConfig  applies a configuration to an existing tenant project.
TenantProjectConfig  defines a tenant project to be added to the specified tenancy unit as well as its initial configuration and properties.
services.tenancyUnits.attachProject  attaches an existing project to a tenancy unit as a new tenant resource.
services.tenancyUnits.applyProjectConfig  applies a configuration to an existing tenant project.
The Service Consumer Management API includes the following additions for managing tenancy units:
TenantProjectConfig  defines a tenant project to be added to the specified tenancy unit, as well as its initial configuration and properties.
services.tenancyUnits.deleteProject  deletes the specified project resource identified by a tenant resource tag.
services.tenancyUnits.undeleteProject  attempts to undelete a previously deleted tenant project.
Service Consumer Management API's Tenancy Units feature is now generally available.
